headline: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., April 06, 2026--AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. (NYSE: AVB) (the "Company") will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on April 27, 2026 after the market close. The Company will hold a conference call on April 28, 2026 at 1:00 PM Eastern Time (ET) to discuss its first quarter 2026 results.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $191
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $202 to $191.
